final:
// // This mux selects in0 when ALUSrcA is high and in1 when ALUSrcA is low
module top_module(
	input clk,
	input ALUSrcA,
	input [31:0]in0,
	input [31:0]in1,
	output wire[31:0]out
);assign out = ALUSrcA? in1 : in0;endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This mux selects in0 when ALUSrcA is high and in1 when ALUSrcA is low
